_note: Observed Singapore public holidays. On these dates carparks bill at the Sunday/PH (SUN_PH) day-type. Includes in-lieu Mondays (when a holiday falls on a Sunday, the next Monday is itself a public holiday). Update annually when MOM gazettes the next year.
_source: Ministry of Manpower — https://www.mom.gov.sg/employment-practices/public-holidays (official gazette; the page currently lists 2024–2026 only).
_todo: Add 2027 once MOM gazettes it (not yet published as of 2026-05). Lunar-calendar holidays (CNY, Hari Raya Puasa/Haji, Vesak, Deepavali) MUST come from the gazette — do not extrapolate.

_notes.2025-05-03: Polling Day for the 2025 General Election — a one-off gazetted PH tied to that election, not a recurring holiday.
